name: prompt-lookup
tagline: Searches, retrieves, and improves AI prompts via the prompts.chat MCP server.
verdict: Small, focused wrapper around three prompts.chat MCP tools with concrete parameters and a clear trigger description. Weak spots: no guidance for MCP call failures (missing prompt, unavailable server), no stated exclusions so it can overlap with the sibling skill-lookup skill, and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion language anywhere; plausible misfire overlap with the similar skill-lookup skill is unaddressed.
No handling anywhere for search_prompts/get_prompt failures, empty results, or a not-found prompt ID.
Variable syntax `${variable}`/`${variable:default}` is named but never shown with a worked before/after fill-in example.
